compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Map the local `idea` status to the Jira `IDEA` status across all reconciler status
maps, with a parity test, and document the Jira-side prerequisites.

## Why

For `idea` to sync, the reconciler must translate it to Jira `IDEA` outbound and
back inbound. rebar keeps several hand-maintained status maps that must all agree;
missing one causes a preflight abort or a silent mistranslation. `idea ↔ IDEA` is a
unique (injective) mapping, so no `rebar-status:` annotation label is needed and no
terminal-set change is required.

## Operator prerequisite + deployment sequencing (LOAD-BEARING)

Jira statuses are workflow-gated: `IDEA` must exist as a status in the target Jira
project's workflow WITH transitions into it (from the initial status, so a synced
idea can converge) and out of it (to To Do for promote, to Done for reject). This
is a Jira-admin action outside the codebase.

Sequencing risk: today a status the Jira workflow cannot reach makes the reconciler
pass abort (preflight `StatusMappingError`, or a `RuntimeError` from
`transition_issue_by_name`) — so shipping `idea` code before `IDEA` is provisioned
in Jira would abort reconciler passes. Mitigate by EITHER (a) provisioning the Jira
`IDEA` workflow status + transitions before/atomically-with merging this story, OR
(b) landing the reconciler transition-failure isolation follow-up (linked
`discovered_from` this epic) first, so a missing `IDEA` transition degrades to a
reported per-mutation failure instead of aborting the whole pass. The
create-drops-status convergence quirk (a newly-synced idea is born in the Jira
default status and reaches `IDEA` on a later pass) is accepted and documented, not
code-fixed here.

## What

- Add `idea → "IDEA"` to `config.local_to_jira_status`.
- Add `"IDEA" → idea` to `config.jira_to_local_status`.
- Add `"IDEA" → idea` to `inbound_differ._JIRA_TO_LOCAL_STATUS` (kept in lock-step
  with the config reverse map by the parity test).
- Add `idea → "IDEA"` to `jira_fields._LOCAL_STATUS_TO_JIRA`.
- Add `idea → "IDEA"` to `outbound_fields._LOCAL_TO_JIRA_STATUS`.
- Extend the parity test to assert the `idea ↔ IDEA` entries.
- Verify/update the local-status vocabulary reference in `inbound_translate.py`
  (`_LOCAL_STATUS_VALUES` and the `_jira_status_to_local` default path) so `idea`
  is a recognized local status there too.
- Document the operator prerequisite (the Jira workflow must have an `IDEA` status
  with transitions into and out of it), the deployment-sequencing requirement
  (Jira provisioned first, or the reconciler-isolation follow-up landed first), and
  the create-drops-status convergence quirk, in a reconciler/Jira setup doc that
  CLAUDE.md can cross-reference.

## Scope

- `src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/config.py` — both direction maps.
- `src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/inbound_differ.py` — `_JIRA_TO_LOCAL_STATUS`.
- `src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/jira_fields.py` — `_LOCAL_STATUS_TO_JIRA`.
- `src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/outbound_fields.py` — `_LOCAL_TO_JIRA_STATUS`.
- `src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/inbound_translate.py` — local-status
  vocabulary reference.
- `tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/state/test_config.py` — parity assertion.
- The reconciler/Jira setup doc — prerequisite + sequencing + convergence-quirk.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `config.local_to_jira_status["idea"]` equals `"IDEA"`.
- [ ] `config.jira_to_local_status["IDEA"]` equals `"idea"`.
- [ ] `inbound_differ._JIRA_TO_LOCAL_STATUS["IDEA"]` equals `"idea"`.
- [ ] `jira_fields._LOCAL_STATUS_TO_JIRA["idea"]` equals `"IDEA"`.
- [ ] `outbound_fields._LOCAL_TO_JIRA_STATUS["idea"]` equals `"IDEA"`.
- [ ] The parity test asserts `config.jira_to_local_status` matches
      `inbound_differ._JIRA_TO_LOCAL_STATUS` including the `IDEA` entry.
- [ ] An outbound status translation of a local `idea` ticket yields Jira `IDEA`
      (test-verified).
- [ ] An inbound translation of Jira `IDEA` yields local `idea` (test-verified).
- [ ] The status-mapping preflight does not abort on a local `idea` status.
- [ ] `inbound_translate` recognizes `idea` as a local status (no fallback to
      `open` for a Jira `IDEA` inbound).
- [ ] The reconciler/Jira setup doc records the Jira-admin prerequisite (add `IDEA`
      status + transitions any→IDEA and IDEA→Done in the project workflow).
- [ ] The doc records the deployment-sequencing requirement (provision Jira `IDEA`
      before merging, or land the reconciler-isolation follow-up first).
- [ ] The doc records the create-drops-status convergence quirk.
- [ ] `make lint` passes for the changed files.
compiled_state.title: Map local 'idea' status to Jira IDEA across reconciler maps
